title: Holy Water doubles attack damage to Undead targets

card.rawText: All creatures inflict 2x Atk damage to Undead-type creatures on the field.

plan.title: Holy Water doubles attack damage to Undead targets
plan.summary: With Holy Water active as field magic, a creature attacking an Undead-type target deals 2x attack damage.

notes: Pre-place Holy Water in an active field magic slot.
Use Skeleton as player_2 primary Undead target.
Ensure not in first turn cycle.

steps: Player 1 attacks Skeleton while Holy Water is field-active.
Inspect damage event multiplier and defender HP loss.

expectedAssertions.label: Undead target took doubled attack damage

manualVerification: Confirm non-Undead targets are not doubled in a separate variant.
riskNotes: This mirrors the Dragon's Bane field-aura route with an Undead target predicate.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Holy Water's Undead damage multiplier aura.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
